query: SELECT id, name, email, cpf, isActive, canLogin, programId, consultorId, turmaId, bypassOnboarding, onboardingLiberado, cadastradoPorAdmin, createdAt, updatedAt FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%Adriana%Pereira%' OR name LIKE '%Adriana%Deus%';
